'''Sahrunba''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who served under [[Sebolto]]'s employ during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted for being the oldest one of the three Dug brothers, the others being [[Jahrunba]] and [[Nahrunba]], who [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggled]] numerous [[Death stick/Legends|death sticks]] to the [[Gran Youth Council]] of [[Pixelito/Legends|Pixelito]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
